title: Driver Licenses - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Youth Services > Driver Licenses 1 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OREGON STATE DMV Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Issues drivers licenses, driving permits, and ID cards. Also, does vehicle licensing and registration. The Limited Vision Condition Program provides an opportunity for individuals with a limited vision condition who use a bioptic telescopic lens to be eligible for restricted driving privileges in Oregon. The At-Risk Driver Program evaluates reports about drivers when there is a concern about their ability to operate a motor vehicle safely. The Remission of Fine Orders and Driver License Reinstatement Opportunity forgives fines and fees due to traffic violations that caused legacy suspensions of driver’s licenses before October 1, 2020. 1905 Lana Avenue NE Salem, OR 97314 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Varies by location (503) 945-5000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details OREGON STATE DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES OREGON STATE DMV
